text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Only the best racers worthy of being part of the
Ultimate Era have gathered to compete in the
Arima Kinen, which marks the climax of Eishin
Flash's three-year career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Eishin Flash remarks that winning first place
today would cap her career off on the perfect
note, I interrupt her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The schedule I cobbled together for her is sloppy
at best, but it's filled with my intense hope that
she'll keep racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To my great relief, Eishin Flash is already
determined to keep running. She gladly offers to
make adjustments to the plan after the race.
